big data 11/2023 accessibleeu center - accessible technology design skills: ux/ui for accessibility - assistive technology projects 03/2023 - 11/2023 bachelor thesis: implementation of an intelligent tutoring system for teaching programming to children an intelligent tutoring system was developed for codelearn, s.l., a company focused on programming education for children. the project, initiated from scratch, involved designing a system capable of evaluating and adapting to students' code submissions. flask and python were utilized for the backend, with a postgresql database for enhanced efficiency and scalability. with deployment facilitated in a university setting. docker was used for containerization, ensuring operational efficiency. this system dynamically analyzes learning progress, adjusting educational programs to improve student interaction and achievement. ongoing improvements were integrated into the company's existing platform. the project also included the incorporation of web technologies like html, css, and javascript for a robust and user- friendly interface. link https://github.com/noocaaa/tfg web 10/2023 - 01/2024 logistics java project this project is an information system developed for a logistics company, specializing in goods transportation. this project incorporates advanced technologies like java, spring (including spring core, spring data, spring boot, and spring security), and thymeleaf, providing a robust platform for managing logistics operations. the system supports two user types, each with specific credentials for accessing their respective views on the platform. developed in an apache tomcat environment, the project utilizes html, css, and thymeleaf for front-end design, and bootstrap for a responsive, modern user interface. dependency management and project building are facilitated through maven, with git employed for version control. lombok, junit, and mockito are also integrated for code optimization and effective testing. a postgresql database is incorporated using jpa/hibernate, ensuring efficient data management. moreover, the project is hosted on dockerhub, allowing for easy replication and deployment on other systems. link https://github.com/noocaaa/logisticsproject 09/2020 -
